title: athlete-guardian — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences for guardian workflow (verification cadence, dispute review) + user preferences for guardians managing their own guardianships.

fields.name: pending_ttl_days
fields.label: Pending TTL (days)
fields.helpText: Days after which pending guardians auto-revoke if never verified.

fields.name: silent_acceptance_hours
fields.label: Silent acceptance window (hours)
fields.helpText: Hours after Guardian Added at which silent-acceptance kicks in (Small + Medium tiers; Enterprise requires HR manual verify).

fields.name: trusted_domains
fields.label: Trusted email domains for auto-household
fields.helpText: Domains matching auto-verify guardians as household members.

fields.name: bounce_threshold
fields.label: Bounce threshold (permanent bounces)
fields.helpText: After N permanent bounces on a guardian's email, auto-disable can_receive_communications.
